user_prompt: There is a progress bar implemented in the first part of the `void CloudUploadView::drawProgress()` function.

Break that out into a class object, implement it in `lib/FlyGui/ProgressBar.cpp`, make it inherit from `FlyGuiItem` but give it parameters like X position, Y position, width, height. Give it functions like `firstDraw()` and `update(progress)` where progress is a floating percentage (make sure <= 0% and >= 100% are handled specifically)
Make `CloudUploadView` hold one of these and use it.
agent_reply: Done. I added a reusable `ProgressBar` item in [ProgressBar.cpp](</c:/GitHubRepos/The-Fly/lib/FlyGui/ProgressBar.cpp>) / [ProgressBar.h](</c:/GitHubRepos/The-Fly/lib/FlyGui/ProgressBar.h>). It inherits from `FlyGuiItem`, takes `x/y/width/height`, exposes `firstDraw()` and `update(float progress)`, and clamps `<= 0%` and `>= 100%` explicitly.

`CloudUploadView` now owns a `ProgressBar` and uses it for the bar drawing, while keeping the upload count/error text local to [CloudUploadView.cpp](</c:/GitHubRepos/The-Fly/lib/FlyGuiViews/CloudUploadView.cpp>).
Build passed. The only warning was the existing ESP-FTP `available()` deprecation warning.

commit_message: moved progress bar into its own element

user_prompt: I want to change all `void redraw(bool forced)` to `bool redraw(bool forced)`, and track if anything was actually redrawn from the top level `void FlyGui::poll()` with `bool drawn = redraw(false);`, this bool `drawn` will later be used for a statistic diagnosis
agent_reply: Done. I changed the FlyGui redraw contract to return `bool`, with [FlyGui::poll](D:/GithubRepos/The-Fly/lib/FlyGui/FlyGui.cpp:158) now capturing:

The base `FlyGui`, `FlyGuiView`, and `FlyGuiItem` paths now aggregate whether display work happened, and the relevant overrides in FlyGui text/progress, views, PIN pad, and WAV playback now return `true` when they actually redraw and `false` when they skip.
- `rg` found no remaining `void redraw(bool forced)` under `lib`, `src`, or `inc`.

Only build warning was the existing third-party `ESP-FTP-Server` `NetworkServer::available()` deprecation. PlatformIO also touched `src/version.c` during the builds; I left existing unrelated dirty files alone.
